decision.value: Remove the flag and old ranking code after Friday
decision.evidence: Remove the flag and delete the old ranking code after Friday

tradeoff.value: Harder rollback removes duplicate query paths
tradeoff.evidence: rollback gets harder, but we stop carrying two query paths
